pages.title: Frank Gay Services - HVAC, Plumbing & Electrical | Central Florida
pages.description: Trusted home services in Central Florida since 1976. AC repair, plumbing, electrical, and drain services available 24/7.
pages.content: Frank Gay Services has been serving Central Florida since 1976. We provide comprehensive HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and drain solutions. Our large fleet of service trucks covers Orlando, The Villages, Lakeland, and Daytona Beach. Available 24/7 for emergencies. Contact us at (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: AC Repair & Installation Services | Frank Gay
pages.description: Fast AC repairs, installations, and maintenance in Central Florida. Same-day service available.
pages.content: Our cooling services include AC repairs (same-day priority), AC installations with free energy audits, and regular maintenance. We handle refrigerant leaks, frozen coils, electrical malfunctions, and faulty thermostats. Before calling, check your thermostat, breaker box, and air filter. Maintenance recommended once yearly (twice in Florida). Call (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Air Conditioning Repair Services | Same-Day AC Repair
pages.description: Expert AC repair for all issues. Same-day service prioritized.
pages.content: AC not cooling? We prioritize same-day repairs for refrigerant leaks, frozen evaporator coils, electrical malfunctions, and faulty thermostats. Warning signs: poor airflow, water leaks, frequent short-cycling, strange odors, odd noises (rattling, screeching, clanging). Before calling, verify thermostat settings, check breaker box, inspect air filters. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: AC Installation & Replacement | Free Energy Audit
pages.description: Professional AC installation with free energy audit and ductwork assessment.
pages.content: We install top AC brands and high-efficiency units to lower utility bills. Every installation includes a free pre-installation energy audit to determine your home's cooling load and assessment of ductwork compatibility. Contact (407) 512-8102 for a free consultation.

pages.title: AC Maintenance & Tune-ups | Preventive Service
pages.description: Regular AC maintenance to extend system life and prevent breakdowns.
pages.content: AC maintenance includes component inspection, refrigerant level checks, coil cleaning, and adjustments. Recommended once a year (ideally spring). In Florida, twice a year is better due to heavy usage. Benefits: extends system life, prevents breakdowns, maintains efficiency. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Electrical Services | Licensed Electricians
pages.description: Professional electrical repair, installation, and surge protection by licensed electricians.
pages.content: Our licensed and certified electricians handle electrical repairs (dead outlets, flickering lights, strange smells, buzzing sounds), electrical installations (ceiling fans, appliances, lighting), whole-home surge protection, and home generator installation. Call (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Home Generator Installation | Standby Generators
pages.description: Expert installation of whole-home and partial standby generators.
pages.content: We install whole-home standby generators and partial generators that automatically restore power during outages. Self-installation is strongly discouraged for permanent standby generators due to safety and code compliance. Only portable units should be handled by homeowners. Licensed electricians ensure safe connection, proper sizing, and code compliance. Generator maintenance needed every 6-12 months or after 100 hours runtime. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Plumbing Services | Repair, Water Heaters & More
pages.description: Comprehensive plumbing services including repairs, water heaters, leak detection, and repiping.
pages.content: Plumbing services include repairs (dripping faucets, burst pipes, running toilets), water heater services (traditional, tankless, on-demand), leak detection using specialized equipment, and whole home repiping with modern PEX or CPVC materials. We work with all pipe types: copper, PVC, PEX. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Plumbing Repair Services | Emergency Plumbing
pages.description: Expert plumbing repair for all common issues and emergencies.
pages.content: We handle dripping faucets, burst pipes, running toilets, and all common plumbing issues. Expertise in copper, PVC, and PEX pipe materials. Available 24/7 for plumbing emergencies. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Water Heater Repair & Installation Services
pages.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance for all water heater types.
pages.content: Water heater services for traditional, tankless, and on-demand units. Common issues: sediment buildup, faulty heating elements, thermostat problems, pressure relief valve issues. Repair vs replace: Often worth repairing if unit is relatively new. Professional assessment recommended. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Leak Detection Services | Hidden Leak Detection
pages.description: Identify and repair hidden leaks without extensive demolition.
pages.content: Professional leak detection for hidden leaks in walls, ceilings, floors, and slabs. Specialized equipment minimizes demolition and property damage. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Whole Home Repiping Services
pages.description: Replace outdated pipes with modern, durable materials.
pages.content: Whole home repiping replaces outdated, corroded, or leaking pipes with modern, durable PEX or CPVC materials. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Drain Clearing & Sewer Line Services
pages.description: Professional drain clearing and sewer line repair services.
pages.content: Drain services include clearing blockages with professional rooter machines and hydro-jetting, and sewer line repair/replacement with trenchless options. NEVER use Drano - it's corrosive and damages pipes. Prevention: don't put food, oils, fats, hygiene products (even 'flushable'), or hair down drains. Use strainers. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Heating Installation | Furnaces & Heat Pumps
pages.description: Professional heating system installation for Central Florida homes.
pages.content: Heating installation services include furnaces, heat pumps, ductless mini-splits, and hybrid systems tailored to your home's heating demands and energy efficiency goals. Annual maintenance essential for efficiency and longevity. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: Family Plan - Maintenance Subscription
pages.description: Annual maintenance plan with priority scheduling and repair discounts.
pages.content: The Family Plan is a subscription service providing priority scheduling, regular tune-ups for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical systems, and discounts on repairs. Includes: 2 AC maintenances per year, 1 electrical maintenance per year, 1 plumbing maintenance per year. Benefits: extends system lifespan, prevents major repairs, maintains efficiency. Contact (407) 512-8102.

pages.title: About Frank Gay Services | Since 1976
pages.description: Nearly 50 years serving Central Florida with trusted home services.
pages.content: Frank Gay Services was founded in 1976 and has been serving Central Florida for nearly 50 years. Starting as a plumbing-focused company in Orlando, we've expanded to comprehensive HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and drain solutions. Large fleet of service trucks, 24/7 emergency availability. Locations: Orlando, The Villages, Lakeland, Daytona Beach. 'The Frank Gay Way' emphasizes customer satisfaction. We support the Wounded Warrior Project.

pages.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.description: Common questions about our services and policies.
pages.content: FAQ highlights: AC maintenance recommended once/year (twice in Florida). AC warning signs: poor airflow, water leaks, short-cycling, strange odors, odd noises. Never use Drano - it damages pipes. Generator installation should be professional, not DIY. Water heater repairs often extend life if unit is relatively new. All electricians licensed and certified. Clog prevention: avoid food, oils, fats, hygiene products, hair down drains; use strainers.

pages.title: Contact Frank Gay Services
pages.description: Get in touch with our team for service requests and questions.
pages.content: Contact Frank Gay Services: Phone (407) 512-8102, Email ask@frankgayservices.com, Address 100 Sunport Lane, Suite 100, Orlando, FL 32809. Available 24/7 for emergencies. Serving Orlando, The Villages, Lakeland, Daytona Beach, and all of Central Florida.
